data.title: Analysts Lift Price Targets On Meta Platforms Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings: Here's Why
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:META) shares are trading narrowly higher Thursday. Multiple analysts raised price targets ahead of earnings in two weeks. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: 3 Medical Services Stocks to Buy to Navigate Industry Challenges
data.description: The Medical Services sector is experiencing significant evolution driven by innovation and digital applications. Growing demand for remote treatment has led to a tremendous upsurge in digital healthcare options over the past few years.

data.title: Co.'s Spate of Events Raises Eyebrows
How Psychedelic Experiences Affect Couples: New Study Looks Into It
data.description: Imperial College London is recruiting couples for a study on how shared psychedelic experiences, such as MDMA, impact relationship intimacy, communication and satisfaction.

data.title: Israeli Military, With Help Of US Intelligence, 'Relentlessly Pursued' Deceased Hamas Leader
data.description: Israeli military identified the body of Sinwar, a top Hamas leader, using dental records and fingerprints, which matched those on file.
